title: Morris Water Maze
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3d8ec","text":"The Morris Water Maze is a widely used behavioural test for assessing spatial learning and memory in rodents. In this protocol, animals are trained to locate a hidden platform in a circular pool by using distal spatial cues. Performance is evaluated using measures such as escape latency, swim path and time spent in the target quadrant. This method provides a reliable and sensitive way of detecting cognitive alterations associated with physiological and pathological changes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5f3qf","text":"This protocol was carried out using Wistar rats.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7249e","text":"It is important to habituate the rats to the operator so that they can try to dismiss the street for the manipulation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c0asp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"adhlu","text":"- Place all the cues.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3rq1d","text":"- Fill the pool, leaving a 10 cm gap at the edge.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5tudt","text":"- Fix the platform 1.5 cm below the water level.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7k3hs","text":"- Heat the water to 22°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"etcsk","text":"- Check the camera focus and light.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"famfg","text":"- Add the dye to the water to make it dark.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2bemr","text":"- Prepare the drying box with the heat lamp and towel. The heat lamp should not occupy the entire box so that the animal can choose whether or not to stay in the warm area and avoid burns.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fhcld","text":"- The operator should leave the water maze area while the animal is in the pool.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"38hcm","text":"- Maintain the water temperature between 19 and 22°C throughout the experiment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2acoa","text":"- Adjusting the camera settings to avoid having reflections on the water will make reviewing the videos easier.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1s8mp","text":"- Ensure that the waiting and action times remain constant to avoid introducing variability to your test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f80nd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bpoa2","text":"- Pool with a diameter of 180 cm and a depth of 60 cm","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1sgv","text":"- Water maze automated Atlantis platform (Panlab) LE820300 760026","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ga","text":"- Water heater for pool AM14-457 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"372cr","text":"- Computer ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52q5b","text":"- Blackfly S BFS-U3-16S2C camera, FLIR","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"24d6j","text":"- SpinView software for controlling camera settings","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"beb77","text":"- Bonsai software for live animal tracking and recording","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6pqrt","text":"- Posters with different geometric shapes in black and white for use as cues.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9u1cq","text":"- No toxic ink for the water.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9p02l","text":"- Heating lamp","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b1oig","text":"- Towels","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aft1s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6dc82","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Check camera settings
Place the platorm in a diferent space from the previous day.
Start the Bonsai workflow, Check that it is recording at 30 fps.
Introduce the Atlantis platform into the pool and ensure it moves correctly, avoiding making waves during the up-and-down movements.
The first day of the experiment is an exception to this rule.
The moment the animal is released and the operator leaves the experimental area, a timer or computer tracking program is started.
Place the animal in the desired start position in the maze, facing the tank center.
Do not throw the animal into the water. Lower it gently to avoid splashing.
Stop the timer when the animal reaches (touches) the platform A trial limit of 2 min.
Put the platorm down , make it not possible to use for the animal
After 1 minute, press the button to raise the platform.
Put the platorm up , make it possible to use for the animal but not visible
Place the animal in the desired start position in the maze, facing the tank center. Use a diferent start position from each trial
Do not throw the animal into the water. Lower it gently to avoid splashing.
The moment the animal is released and the operator leaves the experimental area, a timer or computer tracking program is started.
Stop the timer when the animal reaches (touches) the platform A trial limit of 1 min.
Return to remove the animal and leaving the cage for driying.
Leave the animal for 5 minutes until the next trial
Put the rat on the platform.
Leave the experimental area
Wait 10 seconds
Return to remove the animal and leaving the cage for driying. Wait
Leave the animal for 30 minutes until start trial 2
Put the platorm up, make it possible to use for the animal but not visible
Place the animal in the desired start position in the maze, facing the tank center. Each trial should be started from a different position, chosen randomly.
Do not throw the animal into the water. Lower it gently to avoid splashing.
The moment the animal is released and the operator leaves the experimental area, a timer or computer tracking program is started.
Leave the animal for 30 minutes until start trial 2
Return to remove the animal and leaving the cage for driying.
Stop the timer when the animal reaches (touches) the platform or when is past 1 min
Put the rat on the platform.
Leave the experimental area
Wait 10 seconds
Return to remove the animal and leaving the cage for driying. Wait
Leave the animal for 5 minutes until the next trial
creator: Aroa S Maroto
